todos.title: קמתי שוב מסריח מסגריות וקפה צולל עמוק לשיגעון

posts.title: First photo from the album
posts.body: Just got back from the trip and couldn't wait to share these. The light at golden hour was unreal — straight out of a film. #travel #goldenhour

posts.title: Notes from the team meeting
posts.body: Quick recap: focus on shipping the auth flow this week, then iterate on the feed UI. Let's keep PRs small and reviewable.

posts.title: React hooks deep dive
posts.body: Spent the morning rebuilding our state management with custom hooks. Feels so much cleaner. Sharing the patterns soon.

posts.title: Coffee shop thoughts
posts.body: There's something magical about working from a noisy café. Productivity goes through the roof for some reason.

posts.title: Weekend in Tel Aviv
posts.body: The boardwalk was packed and the sunset was unreal. Photos coming soon.

posts.title: Refactor day
posts.body: Cleaned up 600 lines of legacy code and removed three dependencies. Worth every minute.

posts.title: סיום לימודים בשעה טובה
posts.body:
כמה חיכיתי לזה, והנה זה הגיע
תכף אני באילת
